title: teucrium afrum
intro: Teucrium afrum, also known as African germander or African teucrium, is a shrub-like plant native to the Mediterranean region and parts of Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Teucrium afrum include reducing inflammation and fighting against infections, as well as exhibiting potential anticancer and neuroprotective effects. Teucrium afrum is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be consumed internally to promote overall well-being and reduce the risk of certain diseases.
